SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-02-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-02-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE IN OPEN COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-02-2012 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PALACIOS, VICTOR IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BRIOSOS, CARLEEN REYES STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
